channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: 18-year-old arrested for fatal stabbing of two minors in Rizal cemetery
item.description: CAMP VICENTE LIM, Laguna, Philippines — Inaresto ng pulisya ang isang 18-anyos na dating construction worker kaugnay sa pagpatay sa dalawang menor de edad na babae sa loob ng isang sementeryo sa Baran...

item.title: Iran Faces Leadership Transition Following Death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
item.description: The death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who led Iran for 36 years, has created uncertainty over the country's future amid ongoing conflict. Khamenei, aged 86, was reportedly killed in US-Israeli strikes ...

item.title: Canadian Oil Seen as Stable Option Amid Iran Strikes Disrupting Global Supply
item.description: The recent escalation of strikes in Iran has unsettled global oil markets, prompting investors to look for more stable alternatives. Eric Nuttall, a notable investment strategist, highlighted Canada a...

item.title: Grey seals may have killed a common dolphin in Welsh waters for the first time
item.description: Marine investigators in Wales have recorded the first suspected case of a grey seal killing a short-beaked common dolphin. The adult female dolphin, measuring 6ft in length, was found stranded on Newg...

item.title: Six workers killed in Ormonde building collapse due to unapproved plans
item.description: Six construction workers tragically lost their lives when a two-storey building under construction partially collapsed at the Sixth Amethyst Business Park in Ormonde, Johannesburg, on Monday. City of ...

item.title: Max Scherzer resumes spring training with Blue Jays ahead of official 2026 return announcement
item.description: Max Scherzer took a significant step toward his return to the Toronto Blue Jays by throwing a bullpen session at spring training in Dunedin, Florida, even before the club formally announced his signin...

item.title: The impact of male rape myths on juror decision-making in sexual assault trials
item.description: A recent study examines the influence of male rape myths on juror decisions in sexual assault trials. While most research has focused on female victims, men and boys are also affected, with 275,000 me...

item.title: Iranian Women’s Football Team Maintains Silence Amid Political Turmoil
item.description: The Iranian women’s national football team has once again drawn attention, not for their on-field performance but for the silence surrounding political issues back home. During the 2026 Women’s Asian ...

item.title: Reforming South Africa’s Minibus Taxi Sector Requires Working With Existing Social Networks
item.description: South Africa’s minibus taxi industry forms the backbone of public transport, carrying around 70% of daily commuters, particularly in low-income and peri-urban communities. Despite its size, the sector...

item.title: Trump Signals Expanded US Military Campaign as Iran Conflict Escalates Across Middle East
item.description: President Donald Trump warned that a 'big wave' of US military action against Iran is still to come, as the conflict between Iran, Israel, and the United States intensifies across the Middle East. Tru...

item.title: Daily Mail royal editor rejects claims of unlawfully obtaining Prince Harry’s travel information in High Court trial
item.description: The High Court has heard evidence from Rebecca English, the Daily Mail’s royal editor, as part of Prince Harry’s legal action against Associated Newspapers Limited (ANL), publisher of the Daily Mail. ...

item.title: Granting Voting Rights to Refugees Would Challenge Britain’s Toxic Immigration Politics
item.description: In this opinion piece, Zoe Williams argues that British politics has descended into a damaging competition over who can take the harshest stance on immigration and refugee policy. She begins by critic...

item.title: Calgary urges residents to reduce water use during Bearspaw Feeder Main repairs
item.description: The City of Calgary is asking residents to conserve water ahead of an upcoming shutdown of the Bearspaw South Feeder Main, scheduled to start on March 9 and expected to last four weeks. The feeder mai...

item.title: Bill Clinton Denies Knowledge of Epstein Crimes in Congressional Deposition and Video Statement
item.description: Former U.S. President Bill Clinton provided more than six hours of testimony on February 27, 2026, before the House Oversight Committee in a closed-door deposition in Chappaqua, New York, as part of i...

item.title: Iranian missile and drone attacks escalate across the Gulf as Qatar downs fighter jets and energy markets react
item.description: Tensions across the Middle East have intensified as Iranian missile and drone attacks targeted several Gulf states following US-Israeli strikes on Iran. In Dubai, diners were filmed scrambling for cov...

item.title: United Airlines Flight Makes Emergency Landing at LAX Following Engine Issue
item.description: On Monday, 2 March 2026, a United Airlines Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner, Flight UA 2127, made an emergency landing at Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) due to a reported engine failure. The flight ha...

item.title: Escalating Iran Conflict Drives Oil Price Surge Amid Uncertainty Over U.S. Strategy
item.description: Oil prices surged sharply after the United States and Israel launched attacks on Iran, killing Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and triggering fears of broader instability across the Middle East....

item.title: Investigation Details 2025 Attack on Gaza Aid Workers and Alleged Israeli Cover-Up
item.description: Almost a year after the 2025 attack on a humanitarian convoy in southern Gaza, a new investigation by Forensic Architecture and Earshot has reconstructed the events in detail. Fifteen Palestinian medi...

item.title: Criticism of Starmer’s Foreign Policy and Impact on UK’s Global Standing
item.description: In this column, Richard Littlejohn sharply criticises Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s handling of the UK's role in international military affairs, particularly regarding the United States and Iran. Litt...

item.title: Middle East tensions threaten schedules of major international sports events
item.description: The escalating conflict between Iran and the United States is beginning to have a tangible impact on the global sporting calendar, creating uncertainty for several high-profile athletes and events. Fo...
